title: Deterministic Golden Master Harness via External Capture
context: Needed a stable test oracle to verify parity during a language port (Python to Go) without instrumenting the legacy codebase.
content: The golden master harness runs purely externally via subprocess, forcing TERM=dumb and NO_COLOR=1 for stability. Volatile data (timestamps, UUIDs, absolute paths, git SHAs) is scrubbed from stdout/stderr using strict regex replacement before saving. This guarantees zero-diff determinism across consecutive runs.
anti_patterns: Modifying the production core logic to inject capture hooks.
